anemia_pattern.description: Low Hemoglobin levels indicating potential anemia.

infection_inflammation_pattern.description: Elevated WBC or CRP suggesting possible infection or systemic inflammation.

hyperglycemia_pattern.description: Elevated Glucose or HbA1c indicating impaired glucose tolerance or diabetes risk.

kidney_dysfunction_pattern.description: Elevated Creatinine indicating potential impaired kidney function.

thyroid_imbalance_pattern.description: Abnormal TSH levels indicating potential hypo- or hyperthyroidism.

electrolyte_imbalance_pattern.description: Abnormal Sodium or Potassium levels affecting fluid balance.
